gist.headline: Fresh ink in the garden
gist.blurb: Inkverse has joined the showcase! Now you can turn text prompts into unique tattoo designs with this new creative tool.
gist.summary: Added Inkverse, a generative AI tattoo designer, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use Inkverse to generate custom tattoo concepts directly from the apps list.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy tattoo parlor setting. The project is about tattoos, so the metaphor is applying art to a surface. Polly the bee is the artist, and the Robot is the canvas (getting a decal/paint design).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot painting a floral tattoo design on the chunky robot's metal casing. The robot sits in a comfortable chair, screen glowing lime green (#ecf874). Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Cute bee and robot with chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
